title: Re: Annulments of Regulations and Notifications of the Bank of Thailand related to Cheque Clearing(Sor.Ror.Khor. 2/2565)
text:
Unofficial Translation
This translation is for convenience of those unfamiliar with Thai Language
Please refer to the Thai official version
Regulation of the Bank of Thailand
No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 2/2565
Re: Annulments of Regulations and Notifications of the Bank of Thailand related to
Cheque Clearing
__________________
1. Rationale
The Bank of Thailand (BOT) ceases to provide the Imaged Cheque Clearing and
Archive Systems (ICAS) services and endorses a substitute private ICAS operator. The effort
intends to distinguish the roles between the operator and the regulator of the payment
systems service providers under the Payment Systems Act. The migration also provides the
private sector more convenience to further enhance the systems to interoperate with other
related payment services. In this regard, the BOT deems it appropriate to annul all BOT
regulations and notifications related to the ICAS services after the BOT's ICAS services
discontinuation.
2. Statutory Power
By virtue of the provision of Articles 44 of the Bank of Thailand Act B.E. 2485
and amendments thereafter.
3. Content
Article 1 Repeal the following Bank of Thailand regulations on the Imaged
Cheque Clearing and Archive System and related notifications:
(1) Regulation of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 1/2554
Re: The Imaged Cheque Clearing and Archive System (ICAS), dated 16 September B.E.
2554 (2011)
(2) Regulation of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 2/2557
Re: The Imaged Cheque Clearing and Archive System (ICAS) (First Amendment), dated 27
October B.E. 2557 (2014)

2
(3) Regulation of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 2/2558
Re: The Imaged Cheque Clearing and Archive System (ICAS) (Second Amendment), dated 3
November B.E. 2558 (2015)
(4) Regulation of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 1/2562
Re: The Imaged Cheque Clearing and Archive System (ICAS) (Third Amendment), dated 18
January B.E. 2562 (2019)
(5) Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 7/2554
Re: Standards For Cheques, Imaged Cheques, Substitute Certificates, Descrepency
Notifications, Bill of Exchanges, and Promissory Notes or Any Other Instruments, dated
16 September B.E. 2554 (2011)
(6) Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 9/2554
Re: Submission of Names and Specimen Signatures of Attorney-in-Fact of the Imaged Cheque
Clearing And Archive System (ICAS) Service Users, dated 16 September B.E. 2554 (2011)
(7) Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 10/2554
Re: Procedures For the Same-Day Settlement or the Next-Day Settlement Extensions, dated
16 September B.E. 2554 (2011)
(8) Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 12/2554
Re: Transmission of Cheque Data and Images via the Bank of Thailand's ICAS Workstation,
dated 16 September B.E. 2554 (2011)
(9) Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 17/2554
Re: Commencement Date for the Imaged Cheque Clearing and Archive System (ICAS) services,
dated 9 November B.E. 2554 (2011)
(10) Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 3/2555
Re: Fees and Fines for the Imaged Cheque Clearing and Archive System (ICAS) services, dated
31 January B.E. 2555 (2012)
(11) Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 9/2555
Re: Operating Hours of the Imaged Cheque Clearing and Archive System (ICAS) services, dated
29 June B.E. 2555 (2012)
(12) Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 17/2555
Re: Procedurs for Special Cheque Exchange, dated 13 November B.E. 2555 (2012)
(13) Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 4/2558
Re: Printout of the Imaged Cheque Clearing and Archive System (ICAS), dated 3 November
B.E. 2558 (2015)

3
(14) Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 5/2560
Re: Standard Requirements on Information Security Management System for ICAS Client
Computers, dated 23 May B.E. 2560 (2017)
(15) Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 2/2562
Re: Fees and Fines for the Imaged Cheque Clearing and Archive System (ICAS) services (First
Amendment), dated 18 January B.E. 2562 (2019)
Article 2 Repeal the following Bank of Thailand regulations on the Electronic
Cheque Clearing System for the Bangkok Metropolitan area and related notifications:
(1) Regulation of the Bank of Thailand Re: Electronic Cheque Clearing
System for the Bangkok Metropolitan Area B.E. 2539 (1996), dated 12 July B.E. 2539 (1996)
(2) Regulation of the Bank of Thailand Re: Electronic Cheque
Clearing System for the Bangkok Metropolitan Area (No.2) B.E. 2543 (2000), dated 29
December B.E. 2543 (2000)
(3) Regulation of the Bank of Thailand Re: Electronic Cheque
Clearing System for the Bangkok Metropolitan Area (No.3) B.E. 2545 (2002), dated 31 January
B.E. 2545 (2002)
(4) Regulation of the Bank of Thailand Re: Electronic Cheque
Clearing System for the Bangkok Metropolitan Area (No.4) B.E. 2546 (2003), dated 10 June
B.E. 2546 (2003)
(5) Regulation of the Bank of Thailand Re: Electronic Cheque
Clearing System for the Bangkok Metropolitan Area (No.5) B.E. 2550 (2007), dated 20
December B.E. 2549 (2006)
(6) Regulation of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 6/2550
Re: Electronic Cheque Clearing System for the Bangkok Metropolitan Area (Fifth
Amendment), dated 5 October B.E. 2550 (2007)
(7) Notification of the Bank of Thailand Re: Procedures for Electronic
Cheque Clearing System, dated 12 July B.E. 2539 (1996)
(8) Notification of the Bank of Thailand Re: Fees for Electronic
Cheque Clearing System Services, dated 12 July B.E. 2539 (1996)
(9) Notification of the Bank of Thailand Re: Guidelines and Fees for
Requesting Electronic Cheque Clearing System Services Data, dated 31 July B.E. 2540 (1997)

4
(10) Notification of the Bank of Thailand Re: Fees for Electronic
Cheque Clearing System Services (No.2) B.E. 2541 (1998), dated 19 June B.E. 2541 (1998)
(11) Notification of the Bank of Thailand Re: Procedures and
Operating Hours of Returned Cheque Services (No.2), dated 30 October B.E. 2541 (1998)
(12) Notification of the Bank of Thailand Re: Operating Hours of
Electronic Cheque Clearing System Services, dated 29 December B.E. 2543 (2000)
(13) Notification of the Bank of Thailand Re: Procedures for
Electronic Cheque Clearing System Services (No.2) , dated 31 January B.E. 2545 (2002)
(14) Notification of the Bank of Thailand Re: Use of Credit Positions
on the Electronic Cheque Clearing System for the Bangkok Metropolitan Area (No.2), dated
10 June B.E. 2546 (2003)
(15) Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 10/2550
Re: Use of Credit Positions on the Electronic Cheque Clearing System for the Bangkok
Metropolitan Area (No.2) (First Amendment), dated 31 October B.E. 2550 (2007)
Article 3 Repeal the following Bank of Thailand regulations on the Bill for
Collection Services and related notifications:
(1) Regulation of the Bank of Thailand Re: The Bill for Collection B.E.
2546 (2003), dated 10 January B.E. 2546 (2003)
(2) Regulation of the Bank of Thailand Re: The Bill for Collection
(No.2) B.E. 2548 (2005), dated 7 December B.E. 2548 (2005)
(3) Regulation of the Bank of Thailand Re: The Bill for Collection
(No.3) B.E. 2550 (2007), dated 20 December B.E. 2549 (2006)
(4) Notification of the Bank of Thailand Re: Operating Hours of the Bill
for Collection Services (For Clearing Houses Providing Online Services), dated 10 January B.E.
2546 (2003)
(5) Notification of the Bank of Thailand Re: Procedures for the Bill for
Collection, dated 10 January B.E. 2546 (2003)
(6) Notification of the Bank of Thailand Re: Fees for the Bill for
Collection Services, dated 10 January B.E. 2546 (2003)
(7) Notification of the Bank of Thailand Re: Fines for the Bill for
Collection Services, dated 10 January B.E. 2546 (2003)

5
Article 4 Repeal the following Bank of Thailand regulations on Provincial
Cheque Clearing services and related notifications:
(1) Regulation of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 2/2551
Re: Provincial Cheque Clearing Settlement, dated 12 September B.E. 2551 (2008)
(2) Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor. 8/2551
Re: Guideline, Procedures, and Operating Hours of Provincial Cheque Clearing Settlement,
dated 12 September B.E. 2551 (2008).
Article 5 Repeal the Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor.
3/2561 Re: Procedures for the Imaged Cheque Clearing and Archive System (ICAS) Service
Users to Enter into Bankruptcy Proceedings, dated 23 April B.E. 2561 (2018).
Article 6 Repeal the Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor.
4/2555 Re: Fees for the Electronic Financial Services, dated 31 January B.E. 2555 (2012).
Article 7 Repeal the Notification of the Bank of Thailand No. Sor.Ror.Khor.
5/2555 Re: Fees for the Electronic Financial Services via Certified Servers, dated 31 January
B.E. 2555 (2012).
4. Effective Date
This Regulation shall come into effect from the notification date.
Announced on 5th October B.E. 2565 (2022)
(Mr. Sethaput Suthiwartnarueput)
Governor
Bank of Thailand
Payment Management Division
Payment and Bond Department
Tel 02 283 5035
status: Re: Annulments of Regulations and Notifications of the Bank of Thailand related to Cheque Clearing
